plugins.name: claude-memory
plugins.description: Three-tier cross-session memory for Claude Code: per-session captures consolidate weekly into durable abstractions, auto-injected at session start. Per-project, opt-in, local-only.

plugins.name: delivery-workflow
plugins.description: Feature delivery suite for GitHub: a TDD dev-workflow (with a coverage Stop-gate hook), epic orchestration across an issue hierarchy, PR review-comment resolution, and autonomous CI autoheal.

plugins.name: issue-ops
plugins.description: Turn inputs into structured GitHub issues: bug-rca enriches a bug issue with code + observability root-cause analysis (diagnosis only); spec-to-issues converts a spec/PRD folder into an Epic→Spec→Task hierarchy.

plugins.name: context-docs
plugins.description: Generate a modular set of context-engineering docs under docs/context/ that AI agents lazy-load on demand — architecture, standards, patterns, decisions — for any software project.

plugins.name: design-to-ui
plugins.description: Turn a design into UI components using atomic design. Source-agnostic (Stitch, Claude Design handoff/HTML, or an image) and framework-agnostic (React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, Solid).
